confidence_note: Confidence levels: HIGH (strong evidence from static/dynamic analysis), MODERATE (inferred from code structure or partial evidence), LOW (weak/circumstantial evidence). All IOCs derived from static reverse engineering of 7 binary samples + 9 Python scripts recovered from an open directory on 172.105.0.126.

sha256.context: OpenStrike C beacon - custom C implant, MinGW GCC 15, 11 commands (original)
CS 3.x DLL beacon - MSVC 2012, watermark=0, XOR 0x2E config, tripwired ReflectiveLoader
Shellcode stager - downloads from /qz99, executes via CreateThread (original)
Entry-point debugger - INT3 patch at CALL RAX (original)
VEH test harness - reads C:\cs_final.dat, 30s timeout (original)

Process with no network imports allocating RWX memory, reading file from C:\cs_final.dat, and executing via CreateThread with 4MB stack
Process performing GET https://172.105.0.126:8443/qz99 followed by VirtualAlloc(RWX) + CreateThread
process_patterns.context: stager.exe shellcode download and execution chain

process_patterns.pattern: Process scanning first 50 bytes of loaded shellcode for FF D0 (CALL RAX) and patching to CC (INT3)
process_patterns.context: dbg_loader.exe breakpoint injection for entry-point discovery

process_patterns.pattern: gcc subprocess spawned from non-development process to compile bof_runner.c into shared library

file_access_patterns.pattern: Process reading C:\Windows\System32\ntdll.dll directly from disk (not via LoadLibrary) and parsing PE header to inspect specific RVA offsets
file_access_patterns.context: check_ntdll.py EDR hook detection - reads raw ntdll to bypass in-memory hooks

network_patterns.pattern: HTTPS GET to /updates?id=[0-9a-f]{8} on port 8443 at approximately 5-second intervals with 10% jitter
network_patterns.context: Beacon polling pattern - 5000ms sleep, 10% jitter, hex beacon ID in query string

network_patterns.pattern: HTTPS POST to /submit?id=[0-9a-f]{8} on port 8443 carrying AES-128-CBC encrypted payload with 16-byte HMAC-SHA256 tag appended
HTTPS GET to /register with Cookie header containing base64-encoded RSA-2048 encrypted metadata blob starting with 0x0000BEEF magic
Bimodal GET request sizes to same endpoint - small periodic heartbeats (~100-200 bytes) interspersed with large submissions (up to 2MB)
network_patterns.context: DLL beacon output accumulator pattern - GET-based exfiltration, not POST

cryptographic_indicators.rsa_key_context: RSA-2048 public key shared across all three implant variants (Python, C, DLL). Modulus match is definitive proof of unified operator control. Full DER: 30820122300d06092a864886f70d01010105000382010f003082010a02820101009f12c9cb...
cryptographic_indicators.aes_iv_context: Hardcoded AES-128-CBC initialization vector used by all three implant variants. Deterministic encryption - no forward secrecy.
cryptographic_indicators.cs_config_xor_context: Cobalt Strike 3.x config encoding key in beacon_patched.x64.dll
cryptographic_indicators.cs_watermark_context: Zero watermark indicates cracked or trial CS builder
